news.title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversational Gemini interactions.

news.title: The slowtech revolution is here to kill your phone addiction and rescue your attention span
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

news.title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it.
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] If physical AI is going to match the accomplishments of LLMs, there's a data problem that needs to be solved.

news.title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.

news.title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.

news.title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.

news.title: Indian workers training AI robots to take their jobs
news.description: [BANGKOK POST] KARUR — With a smartphone strapped to her head, Nagireddy Sriramyachandra films herself slicing mangoes in her kitchen in India to train robots powered by artificial intelligence (AI) to take on household jobs in the future.

news.title: Google rolls out Android 17; major AI features to follow this summer
news.description: [THE STAR] Alphabet Inc's Google has begun rolling out Android 17, the latest major update to its popular mobile operating system, though some of its marquee artificial intelligence features will not arrive for another few months.

news.title: Coforge shares jump over 2% as firm eyes $5 billion revenue by FY30. Why Nomura, others see up to 50% upside?

news.title: Elon Musk's AI tool Grok was used in strikes against Iran, says U.S. government
news.description: [THE HINDU] Elon Musk's artificial intelligence tool Grok was used in strikes against Iran, the United States government revealed in a legal briefing seen Tuesday by AFP.
